location.address:
**NEW LOCATION FOR 2026**

Lymm Rugby Club, Crouchley Lane, Lymm, WA13 0AT

food: Food will be available to purchase

brews.name: Waller
brews.description: Pale and refreshing with distinctive hop character. A true thirst quencher.

brews.name: Altitude IPA
brews.description: Where East meets West. A crisp, juicy Mountain IPA with Simcoe and Strata bringing layers of dank pine and ripe strawberry, while Amarillo and Mosaic add bright notes of orange zest and tropical fruit. Intensely drinkable, a clean bitterness balances the juicy opening.

brews.name: Aestival IPA
brews.description: A vibrant Tropical IPA bursting with pineapple, mango and stone fruit from a magnificent seven of US and NZ hops. Juicy mango, guava and citrus lead the palate, carried by a full mouthfeel and finishing sweet and smooth.

brews.name: Otter's Pool
brews.description: A refreshing pale ale with a fragrant hop aroma; it's the perfect accompaniment to the summer season.

brews.name: I Want To Be Classified
brews.description: Both beers made with the exact same malt bill, mash temp, boil time, hop additions and yeast strain. Classified uses a chloride-sulphate ratio of 1:2 and whirlpool-hopped aroma addition. Two same recipes, brewed differently.

brews.name: I Want To Be Stereotyped
brews.description: Both beers made with the exact same malt bill, mash temp, boil time, hop additions and yeast strain. Stereotyped uses a chloride-sulphate ratio of 2:1 and a dip-hopped aroma addition. Two same recipes, brewed differently.

brews.name: Tiny Eyes
brews.description: Hazy pale with notes of blackberry and lime.

brews.name: The Punkiest Monkey That Ever Popped
brews.description: Our collab with the team at Dexter and Jones. A juicy hazy pale ale with lashings of Citra, Motueka and Krush with a sprinkling of Riwaka.

brews.name: Hickling Ghost
brews.description: A harmonious blend of tropical and citrus fruits with a well-balanced malt backbone. Creamy mouthfeel.

brews.name: There's An App For That
brews.description: A 3.8% pale ale pouring with a light haze and absolutely loaded with juicy tropical character. Expect waves of ripe mango, peach and pineapple on the nose, backed up by soft stone fruit sweetness and a bright, clean bitterness that keeps everything crisp and crushable.

brews.name: Quatre
brews.description: A light pale ale blending the best English malts with full-flavoured French hops. Mild bitterness, but lots of hop flavour and aroma, with red berry and citrus flavours shining through.

brews.name: Pint
brews.description: A 3.9% session ale brewed with an all pale malt bill and hopped with a blend of New Zealand and US hops. A burst of zesty aromas, uplifting grapefruit flavours and a subtle lemongrass finish.

brews.name: Pashmina Pale
brews.description: As delicate as its namesake, with Cashmere hops lending flavours of lemon, melon and lychee. Soft aromatics and smooth bitterness complement a gently herbal finish.

brews.name: El Dorado
brews.description: A juicy, easy-drinking pale ale showcasing El Dorado hops.

brews.name: Dream Grill
brews.description: A hazy, hop-forward pale ale packed with juicy fruit character.

brews.name: Kahuna
brews.description: A taste of summer. Clean and crisp on the palate, giving way to that familiar Mosaic flavour blended with passion fruit, leading the drinker on a thirst-quenching journey of tropical fruit and floral notes.

brews.name: The Beautiful North
brews.description: Old faithful Citra meets new hop Krush. A fruit bowl of flavours, bursting with fresh citrus, mango and peach!

brews.name: High Force
brews.description: A hoppy, hazy pale brewed using Citra and Strata; a soft, fluffy malt base with hypnotic fruit layers and a resinous bite.

brews.name: Rambler
brews.description: Plenty of crystal malt and Bramling Cross hops give this beer a subtle balance of malt and autumn-fruit hoppiness.

brews.name: Gold Leaf
brews.description: Golden bitter with old-fashioned English hops.

brews.name: Sir Philip
brews.description: Amber in colour, this premium bitter has a light malty overtone balanced with the classic pairing of Fuggles and Target hops.

brews.name: Darwin's Origin
brews.description: Rich, spicy and malty. Using ingredients from three continents, its zesty character descends into a long, lavish finish.

brews.name: Shropshire Gold
brews.description: Balanced and quaffable.

brews.name: Chocolate Cherry Mild
brews.description: All the class of Dunham Dark, with a dry hint of cherry that cuts through the beer.

brews.name: Single Hop IPA
brews.description: With a strength hidden beneath its smooth caramel notes, the layers of pungent whole-leaf hops show exactly what standalone hops can do.

brews.name: Sunset IPA
brews.description: An American-style IPA at an easy-drinking ABV. Chinook, Centennial, Columbus and Simcoe hops provide plenty of pine and resinous flavours with a fruity top note.

brews.name: Glass Tiles
brews.description: Citra, Mosaic and Simcoe.

brews.name: Opus
brews.description: A clean, hoppy blonde ale.

brews.name: Trixie
brews.description: An American blonde ale, light and hoppy.

brews.name: Lalochezia
brews.description: A golden ale, crisp and easy-drinking.

brews.name: Lazin' on a Sunny Afternoon
brews.description: Golden ale dry-hopped with Fuggles, East Kent Goldings and Bramling Cross. A quintessential summer session ale with notes of hedgerow berries, crisp biscuits and light lychee.

brews.name: Dead Moon
brews.description: A deeply smooth best bitter. Bitter-sweet burnt toffee and hints of marmalade on toast, with a resinous bitter finish that draws you back for more.

brews.name: Stout
brews.description: Dark, smooth and velvety with roasted malt flavours for a balanced, full-bodied experience. Clean finish with a touch of sweetness.

brews.name: Creme Bearlee
brews.description: A luscious, dark and sweet stout. Roasty notes from dark malts combine with the sweetness of molasses and Madagascan vanilla, the perfect entry-level stout.

brews.name: RedRun
brews.description: A hopped lager, crisp and refreshing.

brews.name: Ginger Beer
brews.description: A warming, spicy ginger beer.

brews.name: Fall Out the Sky
brews.description: Golden, with notes of toffee and a dried-fruit aroma followed by a classic, crisp, bitter finish.

brews.name: Never Known Fog Like It
brews.description: A New England pale ale hopped with Chinook, Citra, Mosaic and Simcoe, hand-selected from Yakima Chief.

brews.name: Steady Rolling Man
brews.description: Our pale ale. Incredibly soft and delicate with intense tropical fruit hop aromatics and saturation, this is our vision of the perfect pale ale.

brews.name: Sonoma
brews.description: A refreshing, sessionable, hazy pale ale hopped generously with Mosaic, Centennial and Citra. Resinous notes of sticky mandarin and grapefruit, finishing crisp and clean.

brews.name: Gem State of Mind
brews.description: Bronze medal winner at the World Beer Awards 2025. Hazy, juicy and packed with tropical character. Idaho #7 and Citra hops bring waves of mango, pineapple and citrus, with subtle pine and stone-fruit undertones.

brews.name: Lust For Life
brews.description: Our flagship beer that started it all. Double dry-hopped with Citra, Simcoe and Mosaic. Ripe, juicy mango, peach and pine with the perfect balance of flavour, bitterness and drinkability.

brews.name: Highway to Helles
brews.description: Bright golden colour with a frothy white head and cereal grain on the nose. Fresh and balanced with light malt, grassy floral hops and a touch of dry bitterness.

brews.name: Pina Colada
brews.description: Rum with a rich, evocative burst of pineapple and coconut, perfectly balanced with a lingering sweetness.

brews.name: Berry Lime Blitz
brews.description: Rich blackberry depth lifted by zesty lime, with a subtle flavour of rum for warmth. Lightly sparkling and smooth, with a refreshing, layered finish.

brews.name: Rhubarb & Strawberry
brews.description: A cider twist on a classic dessert: fresh rhubarb juice and sweet crushed strawberries blend exceptionally.

brews.name: Celtic Tiger
brews.description: Golden cider blended with the vibrant natural flavours of pineapple and orange; a refreshing balance of sweet and sour with pressed apple afternotes.

brews.name: Abrahalls AV Vintage
brews.description: Crafted from homegrown Dabinett, Yarlington Mill and Harry Masters cider apples. A finely balanced, smooth, sparkling golden drop with a delicate tease of tannins.

brews.name: Lily The Pink
brews.description: A medium fruity cider with a warm honey hue. Made using 100% cider apples, intensely fruity with candy-apple sweetness and a light body.

about:
The Lymm Beer Festival was the brainchild of the Lymm and District Round Table member Chris Stephens. Started in 2011, the Lymm Beer Fest has quickly established itself as a firm favourite with local people and has become one of the three main annual charity events organised by Lymm and District Round Table in order to raise money for local charities and community groups. The other events are the Lymm Charity Duck Race and the Big Lymm Fireworks.

The event will offer many carefully selected real ales, ciders and perries. Lymm Ladies will also be serving a fantastic selection of gins. There will be live music involving a host of talented local bands and singers, and a selection of food to purchase, with all profits going to charity. For those abstaining or driving we will also be offering free soft drinks.
